case_title: TINA R. HEARD VS. SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAY et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF **DISMISSAL AS TO 2 OF 3 DEFENDANTS** FILED BY PLAINTIFF HEARD, TINA R. AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAY RODRIGUEZ, CARLOS R. LINE 	 ID#2418, MOTOR COACH#8444
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-04-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HEARD, TINA R. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,500.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY HEARD, TINA R. AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAY RODRIGUEZ, CARLOS R. LINE 	 ID#2418, MOTOR COACH#8444 CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-04-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
